race.comment: MOHEGAN RULER (7) finished off strongly from the second half of the field first-up when narrowly beaten at Pinjarra. Tougher here, but he'll be better for the fresh effort and getting out to 1400m is a big tick today. Should be flying late in the race once again. I'M NIPOTE (3) has been strong in this company his past couple, missing by 1.7L over the mile last time out. Back to 1400m today is no issue after he flew late to just miss at Ascot two back. He's placed at this track and trip previously and he can feature in the finish again. CHERYL'S SHOUT (4) couldn't be caught when sitting up front last time out, winning in a photo finish over 1300m at Northam. This looks to set up beautifully for her and while this is tougher, her recent form rates highly. Can repeat the dose without surprising. NICKELPLAY (10) continues to knock on the door and can't be left out of calculations. JAZALOT (5) is better than he showed last time out and can bounce back to form coming back to this trip.
